---
title: "First Post"
author: "Kyle Cahitas"
date: 2026-04-02
categories: [personal]
description: "Starting a blog. Here's what this space is going to be."
---

This is the part where I'm supposed to explain why I'm starting a blog.

Honestly — mostly to have a place to think out loud. Some posts will be 
technical (R code, GIS workflows, thesis updates). Some will just be 
whatever I'm thinking about. Field work observations. Books. Bad jokes 
about watershed morphology.

If you're here for the data science content, the [Research](../../research/index.qmd) 
page is probably more useful. If you're just curious what goes on in 
the head of someone who spends too much time thinking about streamflow, 
you're in the right place.

More soon.
